steps.name: query_preprocessing
steps.input_query: Most commonly used AI data Structures in healthcare
steps.preprocessed_query: Most commonly used AI data Structures in healthcare

results.title: Artificial intelligence in healthcare and medicine: clinical ...
results.snippet: Healthcare systems worldwide face growing challenges, including rising costs, workforce shortages, and disparities in access and quality, particularly in low- and middle-income countries. Artificial intelligence ( AI ) has emerged as a transformative ...

results.title: Integrating and Enhancing Diverse Categories of Medical Data for AI ...
results.snippet: The manuscript will then consider how different types of data can be integrated into a common platform to help AI systems have a broad and more detailed understanding of patients' health status.

results.title: Practical Examples of AI In Healthcare - Analytics Insight
results.snippet: Real-world examples of AI in healthcare , showing how hospitals and clinics use AI for diagnosis, triage, operations, and better patient outcomes.

results.title: The landscape of AI implementation in US hospitals - Nature
results.snippet: Using survey data from 3,560 hospitals across the USA, AI implementation is shown to be spatially heterogeneous, influenced by the local context and institutional characteristics.

results.title: Medical Data Types Used in AI for Smart Healthcare
results.snippet: To power intelligent systems in healthcare , we need a wide variety of medical data types. Think of these as the building blocks that help AI understand, predict, and sometimes even prevent illness.

results.title: A Comprehensive Guide to Machine Learning In Healthcare
results.snippet: Learn how machine learning impacts the healthcare sector and discover its most common real-life applications, algorithms, and adoption challenges and solutions.

steps.name: llm_structuring_output

entity_name.source_title: Medical Data Types Used in AI for Smart Healthcare | by ESSADIK Ibtissam | Medium
entity_name.evidence: EHRs provide a real-time, holistic view of a patient’s health and history... and they often include a wide range of structured and unstructured data.

entity_type.source_title: Integrating and Enhancing Diverse Categories of Medical Data for AI-Driven Healthcare Solutions | Springer Nature Link
entity_type.evidence: This paper aims to discuss the different types and forms of medical data 'electronic health records (EHRs)...'

description.value: A digital version of a patient’s paper chart that acts as a longitudinal record of health history and is used as a primary source for AI training.
description.source_title: Medical Data Types Used in AI for Smart Healthcare | by ESSADIK Ibtissam | Medium
description.evidence: An EHR is a digital version of a patient’s paper chart... This makes EHRs one of the most valuable sources for AI in smart healthcare.

data_composition.value: Demographics, medical history, vital signs, and lab results
data_composition.source_title: Medical Data Types Used in AI for Smart Healthcare | by ESSADIK Ibtissam | Medium
data_composition.evidence: EHR contains the patient’s records from doctors and includes demographics, test results, medical history, history of present illness (HPI), and medications.

entity_name.source_title: Artificial intelligence in healthcare and medicine: clinical applications, therapeutic advances, and future perspectives - PMC Lock
entity_name.evidence: Deep learning (DL) algorithms, for example, have shown remarkable success in detecting abnormalities across various imaging modalities, including X-rays, CT scans, MRIs, and pathology slides.

entity_type.source_title: Medical Data Types Used in AI for Smart Healthcare | by ESSADIK Ibtissam | Medium
entity_type.evidence: Medical imaging is one of the richest and most important data sources in smart healthcare... These images help detect abnormalities, monitor disease progression, and guide treatment.

description.value: Visual data generated from diagnostic scans that AI systems analyze to identify fractures, tumors, or infections.
description.source_title: Practical Examples of AI In Healthcare
description.evidence: Radiology departments use algorithms to scan X-rays, CT scans, and MRIs in seconds. These systems flag strokes, lung nodules, and internal bleeding.

modalities.value: X-ray, CT Scan, MRI, MRA, and Micro-CT
modalities.source_title: Medical Data Types Used in AI for Smart Healthcare | by ESSADIK Ibtissam | Medium
modalities.evidence: commonly used imaging modalities in AI-driven healthcare: 🔎 X-Ray... 🧠 CT Scan... 🧲 MRI... 🧠 MRA... 🔬 What is Micro-CT (µCT)?

entity_name.source_title: Medical Data Types Used in AI for Smart Healthcare | by ESSADIK Ibtissam | Medium
entity_name.evidence: Genomic data is used in precision medicine, where AI helps tailor treatments based on a person’s genetic makeup.

entity_type.source_title: Artificial intelligence in healthcare and medicine: clinical applications, therapeutic advances, and future perspectives - PMC Lock
entity_type.evidence: AI can analyze complex data sets, including electronic health records, medical imaging, and genomic profiles.

description.value: Large-scale information concerning an individual's DNA sequences used by AI to predict disease risk and drug responses.
description.source_title: Medical Data Types Used in AI for Smart Healthcare | by ESSADIK Ibtissam | Medium
description.evidence: AI can sift through billions of base pairs and find patterns... [identifying] hereditary risk factors for conditions like breast cancer.

primary_use.source_title: Integrating and Enhancing Diverse Categories of Medical Data for AI-Driven Healthcare Solutions | Springer Nature Link
primary_use.evidence: future developments of an integrated medical data that will enhance... the development support of precision medicine.

entity_name.source_title: Medical Data Types Used in AI for Smart Healthcare | by ESSADIK Ibtissam | Medium
entity_name.evidence: Wearable devices and health sensors generate real-time data like: Heart rate, Oxygen saturation, Sleep patterns, Blood glucose levels.

entity_type.source_title: Practical Examples of AI In Healthcare
entity_type.evidence: AI analyzes ECGs and wearable data to detect rhythm disorders often missed during routine exams.

description.value: Real-time biometric signals and activity patterns tracked by devices like smartwatches or medical sensors.
description.source_title: Medical Data Types Used in AI for Smart Healthcare | by ESSADIK Ibtissam | Medium
description.evidence: AI uses this data to detect irregularities, monitor chronic conditions, and provide alerts when something seems off.

key_metrics.source_title: Artificial intelligence in healthcare and medicine: clinical applications, therapeutic advances, and future perspectives - PMC Lock
key_metrics.evidence: AI's role in modern medicine spans... personalized care, drug discovery, predictive analytics, telemedicine, and wearable health technologies.

entity_name.source_title: Medical Data Types Used in AI for Smart Healthcare | by ESSADIK Ibtissam | Medium
entity_name.evidence: A large portion of EHR data is unstructured — written in free-text notes.

entity_type.source_title: Medical Data Types Used in AI for Smart Healthcare | by ESSADIK Ibtissam | Medium
entity_type.evidence: NLP turns messy notes into structured insights.

description.value: Qualitative medical documentation written in shorthand or natural language by clinicians, analyzed using NLP.
description.source_title: Practical Examples of AI In Healthcare
description.evidence: Voice tools convert doctor-patient conversations into structured medical notes, cutting hours of paperwork.

processing_technology.source_title: Medical Data Types Used in AI for Smart Healthcare | by ESSADIK Ibtissam | Medium
processing_technology.evidence: NLP models can: Extract clinical terms and symptoms from messy text... Detect disease progression or complications from notes.
